cmd:
set -e
DATA_DIR=/var/lib/easyenclave/data
BIN=/var/lib/easyenclave/bin
until [ -x "$BIN/devopsdefender" ]; do sleep 1; done
mkdir -p "$DATA_DIR/dd-shell" "$DATA_DIR/codex-universal/home" "$DATA_DIR/codex-universal/workspace" "$DATA_DIR/codex-universal/bin"
cat > "$DATA_DIR/codex-universal/codex-universal-shell" <<'EOF'
#!/bin/sh
set -e
BIN=/var/lib/easyenclave/bin
DATA_DIR=/var/lib/easyenclave/data
until [ -x "$BIN/podman" ]; do echo 'codex-universal-shell: waiting for podman'; sleep 2; done
mkdir -p "$DATA_DIR/codex-universal/home" "$DATA_DIR/codex-universal/workspace"
exec "$BIN/podman" run --rm -it \
  --name codex-universal-shell-$$ \
  --pull=missing \
  -e HOME=/root \
  -e TERM=xterm-256color \
  -e COLORTERM=truecolor \
  -e CODEX_ENV_PYTHON_VERSION=3.12 \
  -e CODEX_ENV_NODE_VERSION=22 \
  -e CODEX_ENV_RUST_VERSION=1.90 \
  -e CODEX_ENV_GO_VERSION=1.24.3 \
  -e CODEX_ENV_JAVA_VERSION=21 \
  -e NPM_CONFIG_PREFIX=/root/.npm-global \
  -v "$DATA_DIR/codex-universal/home:/root" \
  -v "$DATA_DIR/codex-universal/workspace:/workspace" \
  -w /workspace \
  ghcr.io/openai/codex-universal:latest \
  bash -lc 'set -e; mkdir -p "$HOME/.npm-global/bin" "$HOME/.config" "$HOME/.ssh"; case ":$PATH:" in *":$HOME/.npm-global/bin:"*) ;; *) printf "%s\n" "export PATH=\$HOME/.npm-global/bin:\$PATH" >> "$HOME/.profile"; export PATH="$HOME/.npm-global/bin:$PATH" ;; esac; if ! command -v codex >/dev/null 2>&1; then npm install -g @openai/codex; fi; cd /workspace; exec bash -l'
EOF
chmod +x "$DATA_DIR/codex-universal/codex-universal-shell"
cp "$BIN/devopsdefender" "$DATA_DIR/codex-universal/bin/devopsdefender"
chmod +x "$DATA_DIR/codex-universal/bin/devopsdefender"
exec "$DATA_DIR/codex-universal/bin/devopsdefender" shell
